backstory.original: Brother Uriah Macawber is a native of Ravenloft, born in the dread domain of Darkon under the iron rule of Azalin Rex. After a horrifying childhood encounter at the Carnival with the demonic entity known as The Caller, Uriah would embrace the worship of the goddess Ezra, Lady of the Mists, offering protection from the forces of darkness to all those in need. Upon joining with the other future members of The Black Dice Society at the infamous House of Lament, Uriah would go on to find true love with his teammate, the undead Aasimar, Nahara... and would eventually discover the dark truth of both the nature of his deity and his mysterious connection to his former liege, the lich-king Azalin Rex.
backstory.display: 乌利亚修士是鸦阁魔域的本地居民，出生在亚扎林·雷克斯铁腕统治下的恐惧领域达孔。自从幼年时期，在嘉年华上与被称为“召唤者”的邪恶人物的一次可怕遭遇后，乌利亚开启了对迷雾女神伊丝拉的崇拜，为所有需要帮助的人提供抵御黑暗的力量。在臭名昭著的哀悼之家与黑骰子协会的其他未来成员汇合后，乌利亚继续与他的队友亡灵神裔纳哈拉一起寻找真爱......并最终发现自身的神性本质，以及他与前主宰，巫妖王亚扎林·雷克斯之间存在神秘纽带的黑暗真相。

description.original: Uriah points at a random enemy and deals damage, preferring enemies that are already damaged.
description.display: 乌利亚指向一名随机敌人并造成伤害，偏好已经受到伤害的敌人。

description.original: Brother Uriah creates a wall of magical blades that damages enemies for 10 seconds.
description.display: 乌利亚修士创造一道魔法刀墙，伤害敌人 10 秒。

longDescription.original: Brother Uriah creates a wall of whirling, razor-sharp blades of magical energy and sends them flying across the area. The blades come to a stop a short distance in front of the formation forming a barrier that lasts for 10 seconds. Each time an enemy passes through the barrier, they take ultimate damage.
longDescription.display: 乌利亚修士创造一面由旋转的锋利魔法能量刀构成的墙，并使其在区域内飞掠。刀在阵型前方近距离处停下，形成持续 10 秒的屏障。每当敌人通过屏障时，都会受到杀招伤害。

description.original: Brother Uriah buffs the damage of Champions in his column and the column behind
description.display: 乌利亚修士提高同列和后列勇士的伤害

name.original: In the Grip of Azalin Rex

description.original: Occasionally, Azalin Rex takes over Brother Uriah, boosting the damage of Nahara and evil Champions.
description.display: 亚扎林·雷克斯有时会控制乌利亚修士，提高纳哈拉和邪恶勇士的伤害。

description.desc: $(source_hero) increases the damage of all Champions in his column and the column behind him by $(amount)%.
$(source_hero)使同列和后列所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%。

tipText.original: Brother Uriah increases the damage of Champons in his column and the column behind.
tipText.display: 乌利亚修士提高同列和后列勇士的伤害。

description.pre: $(source_hero) heals all champions within two slots for $(not_buffed amount) health per second. This effect is increased by $(amount___2)% for each formation slot containing a dead or undead Champion or an escort, stacking additively and applying multiplicatively.
$(source_hero)每秒为身边两格内的所有勇士回复 $(not_buffed amount) 生命值。阵型中每有一个栏位包含已死亡勇士、亡灵勇士或护卫，此效果提升 $(amount___2)%，以加算方式堆叠并以乘算方式生效。

tipText.original: Brother Uriah heals all Champions within 2 slots of him.
tipText.display: 乌利亚修士治疗距离他 2 个栏位内的所有勇士。

name.original: In the Grip of Azalin Rex

description.pre: After $(attack_count) normal attacks by Champions in the formation, Azalin Rex takes over $(source_hero) for $(seconds_plural amount). While controlled by Azalin Rex, $(source_hero) increases the damage of Nahara and all evil Champions by $(amount___2)%.
阵型中的勇士进行 $(attack_count) 次普通攻击后，亚扎林·雷克斯控制$(source_hero)，持续 $(seconds_plural amount)。被亚扎林·雷克斯控制期间，$(source_hero) 使纳哈拉和所有邪恶勇士的伤害提高 $(amount__2)%。

description.desc: Brother Uriah gains the Hunter role and reads from the Book of Exalted Deeds, making Undead and Fiends his Favored Foes and all Champions deal an additional $(amount)% damage to them.
乌利亚修士获得猎人角色，他阅读《崇善之书》，将亡灵和炼狱生物视为他的偏好对手，所有勇士对它们额外造成 $(amount)% 的伤害。

specializationDescription.original: Brother Uriah fights his evil connection, helping champions defeat the Undead and Fiends.
specializationDescription.display: 乌利亚修士抵抗他的邪恶纽带，帮助勇士击败亡灵和炼狱生物。

description.desc: Azalin reads from the Book of Vile Darkness, increasing the effect of $(upgrade_name id) by $(amount)%.
亚扎林阅读《邪恶之书》，使$(upgrade_name id)的效果提高 $(amount)%。

specializationDescription.original: Brother Uriah embraces his evil connection, helping evil champions deal even more damage.
specializationDescription.display: 乌利亚修士拥抱他的邪恶纽带，帮助邪恶勇士造成更高伤害。

description.original: My sorrows for your troubles.
description.display: 我为你的烦恼感到遗憾。

description.original: Um, I'm not positive that you, ah, have the right fellow.
description.display: 呃，我不确定你的同伴足够靠谱。

description.original: Perhaps, we should consider reconvening at some other location?
description.display: 也许，我们应该考虑去其他地方集会？

description.original: We must, I suppose, find our courage and press onward.
description.display: 我们可能必须鼓起勇气，继续前进。

description.original: In all things Ezra's guidance provides.
description.display: 伊丝拉指引一切。

description.original: My goddess holds secrets I could never have fathomed.
description.display: 我的女神掌握着我永远无法理解的秘密。

description.original: I remain, I'm afraid, within the darklord's foul reach.
description.display: 恐怕我仍处于黑暗领主的邪恶掌控之中。

description.original: I commend myself to the pure hands of Ezra.
description.display: 我将自己奉献给伊丝拉的纯洁双手。

effects.description: Increases $(upgrade_name id) to heal targets within three slots

description.original: What plans he has for me I cannot say, only that they must be dire.
description.display: 我无法确定他对我有什么计划，只能说肯定很可怕。

effects.description: Increases the duration of Brother Uriah's 'In the Grip of Azalin Rex' ability by $amount%

description.original: The dead will rise and do Azalin's bidding, er, my bidding.
description.display: 亡者将会崛起，听从亚扎林的......呃，我的命令。

effects.description: Increases the duration of Brother Uriah's 'In the Grip of Azalin Rex' ability by $amount%

description.original: Beside Nahara, one could say I am a braver man.
description.display: 与纳哈拉相比，应该说我更勇敢。

description.original: A fine and fetching cap.
description.display: 一顶精致迷人的帽子。

description.original: I only take it out for special occasions.
description.display: 我只在特殊场合才戴上它。

name.display: 乌利亚的帽子，但更漂亮

description.original: Notice anything new?
description.display: 注意到新东西了吗？

description.original: You don't think it's too, ah, flashy, do you?
description.display: 你不觉得它，呃，太浮夸了吗？

description.original: I was bequeathed this mace by the Church of Ezra. I don't want to get it dirty!
description.display: 我是伊丝拉教会传授给我的钉头锤。我不想弄脏它！

description.original: Sometimes just holding a weapon is enough to get your point across.
description.display: 有时候，手持武器就足以证明你的想法。

description.original: Ezra bless my mace, but also, um, let's see if we can just talk things out.
description.display: 伊丝拉保佑我的钉头锤，但话说回来，试试我们能否成功沟通。

description.original: When I hold it, I know Ezra is near. Then I summon her blessings from FAR back.
description.display: 当我握住它时，能感觉伊丝拉就在身边。然后我从遥远的彼方将她的祝福召唤回来。

description.original: Our Guardian of the Mists makes certain we come to no harm.
description.display: 我们的迷雾守护者确保我们不会受到伤害。

description.original: ...provided we observe her proscriptions, of course.
description.display: ......当然，前提是我们遵守她的禁令。

description.original: The belladonna of Ezra signifies healing. What else would it be?
description.display: 伊丝拉的颠茄象征着治愈。不然呢？

description.original: I cannot fault the goddess for her power, nor blame her for her deceptions.
description.display: 我不能怪罪女神的力量，也不能责备她的欺骗。

description.original: The carnival is a delightful distraction. The company was, well, quite more distracting.
description.display: 嘉年华是令人愉快的消遣。我的同伴则更令人分心。

description.original: In the darkness of our adventures, meeting Nahara stands out brightly as a star.
description.display: 在我们黑暗的冒险中，遇见纳哈拉就像星星一样耀眼。

description.original: I wish beyond all to travel by her side, to care for one another until we fall.
description.display: 我最大的愿望就是与她一起旅行，互相关怀直到死亡。

description.original: 'Til death do us part' takes on a different sort of meaning in our case...
description.display: “直到死亡把我们分开”在我们身上代表着另一种含义......

description.original: There's nothing like raising your voice in song to strengthen the spirit!
description.display: 没有比大声歌唱更能提振精神的了！

effects.description: Increases the effect of all Brother Uriah's Specializations by $amount%

description.original: Let us turn to page 42 for 'Our Great Lady, Preserve Us From the Skin Thieves.'
description.display: 让我们翻到第 42 页，歌唱“我们伟大的女神，保佑我们免受窃肤贼的侵害”

effects.description: Increases the effect of all Brother Uriah's Specializations by $amount%

description.original: I have found much comfort in this book.
description.display: 我在这本书中找到了很多安慰。

effects.description: Increases the effect of all Brother Uriah's Specializations by $amount%

description.original: The power is unmatched. And it comes with a halo!
description.display: 它的力量无与伦比，还自带光环！

effects.description: Increases the effect of all Brother Uriah's Specializations by $amount%

description.original: To be technical, all toes found in baked goods, are suspicious.
description.display: 老实说，在烘焙食品中发现的所有脚趾都很可疑。

description.original: This toe is most definitely like my own...it was another clone of Azalin's, poor devil.
description.display: 这只脚趾跟我自己的一模一样......它肯定属于亚扎林的另一个复制体，可怜的魔鬼。

description.original: In my dreams, I see the moon dragon.
description.display: 在梦中，我看到了月亮龙。

name.display: 乌利亚与范·里希顿：永远的好朋友！

description.original: Just some art to express my esteem for the greatest vampire hunter in the mists.
description.display: 这只是一些艺术品，用于表达我对迷雾中最伟大的吸血鬼猎人的敬意。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
Increases the damage of all Female Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Human Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a WIS score of 15 or higher in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions with a INT score of 11 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Good Champions by $(amount)%

After a horrifying childhood encounter at the Carnival with the demonic entity known as The Caller, Uriah would embrace the worship of the goddess Ezra, Lady of the Mists, offering protection from the forces of darkness to all those in need. Upon joining with the other future members of The Black Dice Society at the infamous House of Lament, Uriah would go on to find true love with his teammate, the undead Aasimar, Nahara... and would eventually discover the dark truth of both the nature of his deity and his mysterious connection to his former liege, the lich-king Azalin Rex.

original.description: Our Guardian of the Mists makes certain we come to no harm.

display.name: 伊丝拉的护佑
display.description: 我们的迷雾守护者确保我们不会受到伤害。

display.name: 迷雾防御

display.name: 信仰之盾
display.description: 伊丝拉的颠茄象征着治愈。不然呢？

display.name: 双面女神捍卫者
display.description: 我不能怪罪女神的力量，也不能责备她的欺骗。

original.name: Witchlight Ticket Stubs
original.description: The carnival is a delightful distraction. The company was, well, quite more distracting.

display.name: 女巫之光票根
display.description: 嘉年华是令人愉快的消遣。我的同伴则更令人分心。

original.name: First Date Souvenir
original.description: In the darkness of our adventures, meeting Nahara stands out brightly as a star.

display.name: 首次约会纪念品
display.description: 在我们黑暗的冒险中，遇见纳哈拉就像星星一样耀眼。

original.name: Engagement Ring
original.description: I wish beyond all to travel by her side, to care for one another until we fall.

display.name: 订婚戒指
display.description: 我最大的愿望就是与她一起旅行，互相关怀直到死亡。

display.description: 老实说，在烘焙食品中发现的所有脚趾都很可疑。

original.name: Toe of a Clone
original.description: This toe is most definitely like my own...it was another clone of Azalin's, poor devil.

display.name: 复制人的脚趾
display.description: 这只脚趾跟我自己的一模一样......它肯定属于亚扎林的另一个复制体，可怜的魔鬼。

original.description: In my dreams, I see the moon dragon.

display.name: 曼加塔的龙鳞
display.description: 在梦中，我看到了月亮龙。

original.name: Uriah and Van Richten: BFFs!
original.description: Just some art to express my esteem for the greatest vampire hunter in the mists.

display.name: 乌利亚与范·里希顿：永远的好朋友！
display.description: 这只是一些艺术品，用于表达我对迷雾中最伟大的吸血鬼猎人的敬意。
